chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1323 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5099/2025 2. For hearing of Misc. No.5582/2021 3. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Mr. Waseem Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General This petition was filed in 2021 in the civil jurisdiction of this court and the primary purpose of obtaining bail for the petitioner who is accused in some criminal proceedings. While the petitioner remained at liberty to seek appropriate remedy before the learned trial Court etc. no case is demonstrated for having approached the High Court directly. Even otherwise this matter is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment / order of this Court in the case of Syed Jawad Arshad vs. Federation of Pakistan (CP D 1083 of 2020) and other connected matters and Salfi Textile Mills vs. Federation of Pakistan (CP D 831 of 2013) and other connected matters, and in mutatis mutandis application thereof this petition found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
